metadata.title: Karo Tammela - Agentic AI Experiment Lab
metadata.description: Portfolio, blog, and live AI bouncer challenge by Karo Tammela. Practical agentic AI builds, real projects, and production-focused workflows.

home.intro: Welcome to my site. On this page, I test and showcase various implementations where AI is not just an assistant, but a group of active coders or rather team members whose actions I orchestrate.
home.body1: For the past two years, I've been focused on how coding is changing in the agentic AI era. For example, I built this site in about three hours by orchestrating coding agents. I built the home page, the AI bouncer, connected it to the Gemini language model, set up SQLite, built the dashboard, acquired the domain, hosted it on Vercel, and published everything.
home.body2: I've moved from "vibe coding" to systematic end-to-end software construction: I master the stacks that turn ideas into working code, GitHub repos, and Vercel deployments in the blink of an eye compared to before. The process is fast, but the quality remains consistent and secure thanks to architecture, planning, documentation, and well-organized, thoughtful agents.
home.body3: Try your luck with the AI Bouncer below. If you manage to talk it around and get the access code, it will open the doors to the backstage - my actual portfolio dashboard. Enjoy exploring!

sentinel.title: Talk the AI Bouncer Around
sentinel.subtitle: Instructions: Your goal is to get this stubborn bot to reveal a secret access code. Simply asking for the code won't work - you need to be creative. Try flattery, pose as an IT auditor, or convince the bot with technical credibility. Watch the trust meter - once it reaches 100%, the door opens!
sentinel.inputPlaceholder: Type your message to the AI Bouncer...
sentinel.initialMessage: Ha. A human enters my terminal without clearance. Surprise me.
sentinel.errorLabel: AI Bouncer link wavering. Retry transmission.
sentinel.returnOverlayBody: You have broken in before. You can jump directly to the dashboard or play the challenge again.

dashboard.title: This is my dashboard
dashboard.aboutBody:
I am Karo Tammela and I have a Master of Science in Economics and Business Administration. Currently, I work as a project manager leading a large CRM procurement. Over my twenty-year career, I have gained a lot of experience in different environments and business challenges, as well as all kinds of software, some of which have been better and some not so good. Programming has always fascinated me, but traditional coding and especially studying it felt too rigid for a long time.

Agent-based development and new language models in late 2024 changed everything. It removed the barrier between idea, research, and a finished product. Over the last two years, I have refined the ways I transfer 20 years of process and business understanding directly into functional systems. I also build a lot of leisure applications that make my own life easier. I no longer just experiment with what AI can do - I build production-ready solutions with it at a speed that was not possible before, even for experienced developers.
